title: Quitting smoking: Provincial and territorial services - Canada.ca
content:
## Quitting smoking: Provincial and territorial services
- Provincial and territorial quit services
- Prevention and quitting smoking resources
Visit Tools for a smoke-free life for additional resources including videos and an online quit planner tool.
Considering quitting smoking or another tobacco product — or know someone who is?
Access free, convenient and confidential support. Trained specialists can provide counselling, help develop a quit smoking plan, answer questions and provide referrals to programs and services in your community.
Click on your province or territory to access services to quit smoking.
- Newfoundland and Labrador
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island
Or call 1-866-366-3667 toll-free and talk to a quit coach.
- Smoke Free Curious: A national campaign to help people quit smoking
- Smoking cessation support campaign for Quebec residents
- Learn about health warnings and other messages that are part of tobacco product labelling
- Smoking, vaping and tobacco
